About FIREandLife

Our Mission: Bringing clarity to Financial Independence while balancing fulfillment with the time you're given.

FIREandLife was built on a simple idea: Financial Independence should empower your life—not delay it. We help people make smarter money decisions without sacrificing joy along the way.

Our Philosophy

  • Life still happens on the path to FI—embrace it.
  • Extreme frugality isn’t sustainable or healthy.
  • Happiness isn’t something you defer until “someday.”
  • Your purpose is more than just a savings goal.

© 2025 FIRE and Life. Built with ❤️ for the FI community.
